basic_details.job_title: ONGC Graduate Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Geologists, Engineers Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Limited (ONGC)
basic_details.short_information: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Limited (ONGC) has announced the Graduate Trainee Recruitment 2026 for young graduates, engineers and geologists. The organisation is inviting applications from eligible candidates for E1 Level Graduate Trainee positions in various engineering and geoscience disciplines.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 17-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: Updated Soon

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B.Tech / M.Sc / Relevant Engineering and Geoscience Qualifications

how_to_apply: Visit the official ONGC career website.
Click on the online application link.
Complete registration using your email ID and mobile number.
Fill in all required details in the application form.
Upload necessary documents, photograph and signature.
Submit the application form before the closing date.
Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.oil_and_natural_gas_corporation_limited_: B.E / B.Tech / M.Sc / Relevant Engineering and Geoscience Qualifications

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 17-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: Updated Soon

content_sections.heading: ONGC Graduate Trainee Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: ONGC is inviting applications for Graduate Trainee positions for Engineers and Geologists at E1 level. The recruitment includes opportunities in technical and geoscience fields.

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for ONGC Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required educational qualifications for engineering and geoscience positions can apply for ONGC Graduate Trainee Recruitment 2026. Engineering Posts: Candidates with B.E / B.Tech degree in relevant engineering disciplines. Geologist Posts: Candidates with M.Sc / relevant postgraduate qualification in Geology or Geoscience. Other Requirements: Candidates must fulfil the age limit and eligibility conditions mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ONGC Graduate Trainee Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official ONGC career website. Open the Recruitment / Career section. Read the official notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Complete registration using your email ID and mobile number. Fill in all required details in the application form. Upload necessary documents, photograph and signature. Submit the application form before the closing date. Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the name of the organization conducting ONGC Graduate Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Limited (ONGC) is conducting the Graduate Trainee Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name in ONGC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Graduate Trainee (GT) positions at E1 Level for Engineers and Geologists.

faq.question: Q3. When will the ONGC Graduate Trainee Recruitment 2026 application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process will start from 17 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for ONGC Graduate Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online will be announced in the official recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available under ONGC Graduate Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The total number of vacancies will be updated by ONGC in the detailed notification.
